request_payload.exposure_text: As a concerned citizen, I've noticed how recent security lapses have put our communities at risk. While some worry about expanded domestic security powers, we can't ignore the facts: last year's coordinated attacks in three major cities showed how unprepared we were. Our agencies need better tools to prevent such tragedies. It's not about giving up liberties - it's about giving our protectors the means to do their jobs effectively. #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
